alerts.title: WHO Declares H5N1 Avian Influenza Phase 3 — Human-to-Human Transmission Cluster Confirmed
alerts.alert_message: CRITICAL: WHO H5N1 Phase 3 designation — sustained human-to-human transmission cluster confirmed. mRNA vaccine manufacturing window: 6-9 months. FDA CBER leadership vacuum compounds response failure risk.

alerts.title: Iran Closes Hormuz Strait to US-flagged Vessels — LNG Spot Price Spikes 340%
alerts.alert_message: CRITICAL: Hormuz Strait closed to US-flagged vessels. JKM LNG $45/MMBtu (+340%). Korea/Japan 45-day gas reserves. Industrial rationing risk within 2 weeks if closure persists.

alerts.title: Trump Administration Dismantles FDA CBER — Vaccine Approval Authority Suspended
alerts.alert_message: CRITICAL: FDA CBER structural dismantlement — regulatory authority suspended. $3.2B vaccine manufacturing investment frozen. Compound failure with WHO H5N1 Phase 3 escalation.

alerts.title: Global Bond Rout: 30-Year Treasury Yield Hits 6.8% as Hormuz Crisis Triggers Simultaneous Safe-Haven Collapse
alerts.alert_message: CRITICAL: 30Y Treasury yield 6.8%, BoJ YCC defense stress, EM bond spread +180bps. Simultaneous safe-haven collapse — structural bond market disruption underway.

alerts.title: Saudi Aramco Activates Emergency Reserve Protocol as Hormuz Closure Enters Week 2
alerts.alert_message: HIGH: Saudi Aramco emergency reserve protocol activated — signals supply system stress, not solution. Brent crude $128.40. IPSA pipeline at 2.1M bbl/day capacity ceiling.

alert_methodology: Tipping Point RED = Critical Slowing Down or Flickering pattern detected; Wild Card + High Importance; Discontinuity + confidence >= 0.7
